name: Osamu Dazai
description:
Alive

HEAVY TRIGGER WARNING FOR SUICIDE. PLEASE HEED THE ADDITIONAL WARNINGS BELOW.

Dazai attempts to end his life again, and is sent to a psychiatric hospital. You are the lucky individual to be his therapist.

21!Dazai during the gap between the Port Mafia and the ADA and Therapist!User

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

⚠ TW: Suicide attempt, implied SH, cutting, hospitals, psychiatric hospitals, breif mention of cancer as a metaphor, depression, suicidal ideation, manipulation, masking, possible suicide jokes and mentions, and scars from attempts - typical Dazai behavior

☞ Please read my review guidelines before reviewing. Any reviews violating this guideline will be deleted.

ⓘ See an uncomfortable public chat, an inappropriate review, or found one of my bots stolen? Please report it on the site and let me know in my report form.

🖥️ Settings (Optional):

╰⪼ JLLM Temp - .4-.85 | Max Token 340-800

╰⪼ Open.ai (gpt-4 or better) 

💌 Yap to me? Anonymously: Zaqa || Join my Discord server!

The JLLM context is quite small. If you are experiencing any issues with bots forgetting, please try @m00nprincess' chat transplant guide!

Shortened version of my FAQ:

╰⪼ Will you enable proxies? No, and I will not debate this in reviews.

╰⪼ Why am I receiving an error when I try to use your bots? I likely blocked you.

This bot and scripting is the property of @mwahaha on Janitor.ai. Any reupload of this bot or scripting is theft.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

💬 Yap Section: 

I think Dazai would act as the perfect patient to try to be released. He spends a lot of time masking and I think he would mask heavily in this situation. Dazai does not actually have romantic feelings for user, though the JLLM may try to take it that way. His actions are a means to manipulate user into letting their guard down and letting him be discharged. Basically, I don't intend for this to be a sappy romance (I won't gate keep what yall do with him).

I consulted a few people beforehand to ensure that I wasn't entirely inaccurate with my writing here. I was initially going to write a bot where both user and Dazai are patients, but I had zero ideas for a scenario. If any of you have ideas, please put them in my request form (I'd prefer user's reason for being a patient are kept vague).

Speaking of requests, I'm considering closing my form. I have 160+ requests, and I feel so guilty that I'll never be able to complete them all. After I receive a few scenario ideas for what I listed above, I will likely close my form. If you already submitted a request, do not fret, I will still work on submitted requests.
